hooks.command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/wt.sh" config state marker set 🤖 || true
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/wt.sh" config state marker set 💬 || true
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/wt.sh" config state marker set 💬 || true
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/wt.sh" config state marker set 💬 || true
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/wt.sh" config state marker set 💬 || true
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/wt.sh" config state marker clear || true
bash -c 'set -o pipefail; name=$(jq -er .name) || exit 1; cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" || exit 1; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/wt.sh" switch --create "$name" --no-cd --format=json | jq -er .path'
bash -c 'p=$(jq -er .worktree_path) || exit 1; cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" || exit 1; [ -e "$p" ] || exit 0; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/wt.sh" remove --foreground "$p"'
